name: Oomph!
description: '''Oomph!''' is a German [[Rock music|rock]] band from [[Wolfsburg]], formed in 1989. The band pioneered the {{lang|de|[[Neue Deutsche Härte]]|italic=no}} movement. Their work contains lyrics in both English and German, with a shift towards German exclusively on recent albums (all works from ''[[GlaubeLiebeTod]]'' onwards are entirely in German).
